parameters.jsCode:
const raw = $input.first().json;
const alert = {
  id: raw.id,
  timestamp: raw.timestamp,
  rule_id: raw.rule?.id,
  rule_description: raw.rule?.description,
  level: raw.rule?.level,
  groups: raw.rule?.groups || [],
  mitre_ids: (raw.rule?.mitre || []).map(m => m.id),
  srcip: raw.data?.srcip || raw.src_ip,
  user: raw.data?.user || raw.user,
  full_log: raw.full_log,
  location: raw.location,
  agent_name: raw.agent?.name,
  aws_account_id: raw.data?.aws_account_id || raw.data?.recipient_account_id,
  aws_region: raw.data?.aws_region,
  event_name: raw.data?.eventName
};
const severity = alert.level >= 12 ? 'critical'
  : alert.level >= 8  ? 'high'
  : alert.level >= 6  ? 'medium'
  : 'low';
return [{ json: { ...alert, severity } }];

parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({ project_id: 1, tracker_id: 2, subject: 'Wazuh [' + $json.severity.toUpperCase() + ']: ' + $json.rule_description, description: 'Alert ID: ' + $json.id + '
Timestamp: ' + $json.timestamp + '
IP: ' + $json.srcip + '
Account: ' + $json.aws_account_id + '
MITRE: ' + $json.mitre_ids.join(', '), priority_id: $json.severity === 'critical' ? 4 : 3 }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ project_id: 1, tracker_id: 2, subject: 'Wazuh [HIGH]: ' + $json.rule_description, description: 'Alert ID: ' + $json.id + '\nIP: ' + $json.srcip, priority_id: 3 }) }}
